items.name: Manage Knowledge Ownership Group
items.short_description: Catalog item for managing knowledge ownership group
items.description:
Choose request type

  • Create ownership group - this option creates a new ownership group
  • Edit ownership group - this option lets you modify ownership group details

items.name: Retire a Standard Change Template
items.description: Request an existing Standard Change Template is made unavailable when it is no longer required or no longer acceptable as a Standard Change.  This will be confirmed by your Change Management team.

items.name: Grant role delegation rights within a group
items.description: A role delegator may delegate any role they have to any member of the specified group

items.name: Request email alias
items.description: For requesting a new email alias, please provide the preferred email alias below.

items.name: Access
items.description:
Microsoft Access

  • Publish, update, manage, and share data with others via the web-
  • Analyze your information from multiple sources and gain more insights by bringing together all of your data, from spreadsheets to server databases
  • Keep your data secure and compliant with easy data backup and auditing
  • Simplified Expression Builder makes it faster and easier for you to build out logic and expressions in your database
  • Data caching helps ensure that changes made to applications and data while you're offline—including line-of-business information—are automatically synchronized when a connection is restored

items.name: Cisco jabber softphone
items.description: Get secure, reliable communications with Cisco Jabber's soft-phone features, including HD voice, video and desktop sharing.

items.name: Standard Laptop
items.description:
x1 Carbon

The x1 Carbon is Lenovo's lightest ThinkPad yet. It provides a QHD display that fights glare and weighs less than three pounds. Ideal for most computing tasks, and highly mobile. 

Technical Specs:

  • Intel core i5 processor
  • 512GB solid state drive (SSD) 
  • Backlit keyboard

items.name: Pixel 4a
items.description:
Key features:

Display: 5.81 inches

Camera: 12.2MP rear and 8MP front camera

Battery: 3140 mAh

RAM: 6GB

Processor: Qualcomm snapdragon 730G

items.name: Adobe Acrobat Pro
items.short_description: Create, edit or convert PDF files
items.description:
Adobe® Acrobat® XI software brings you new features to make your day easier. From converting PDF files into editable Microsoft Word, Excel, or PowerPoint files to turning existing paper or Word forms into fillable PDF forms, Acrobat XI is loaded with new features to help you:

  • Convert PDFs — Convert PDF files to editable Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files
  • Edit PDF files — Make fast, easy edits to text and images directly in PDF files
  • Create fillable PDF forms — Don’t waste time with inefficient paper or Word forms

items.name: Finishing Services
items.short_description: Professional binding and finishing for documents
items.description:
Services Include:

Professional document printing, binding, and shipping for corporate meetings and events.
